title: KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER - 211info
text: KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides full service pharmacy, health, dental, drug and alcohol, public health nursing, health education services, and mental health services for tribal members. 330 Chiloquin Boulevard Chiloquin, OR 97624 Eligibility: American Indians/Alaska Natives from federally recognized tribes are eligible for direct services Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 882-1487 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-1487 Alternate (541) 783-3295 Toll-free (800) 552-6290 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Direct services are available on-site, unless otherwise noted. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Proof of Native American heritage AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Services: Indian Health Service Clinics Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - MEDICAL AND PHARMACY CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER
